name: Gammon (Ham) Steaks with Whiskey Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the ham steaks with melted butter.
2. Snip any excess fat to prevent curling, then grill for 7-8 minutes on each side.
3. To make the sauce, gently fry onions in the remaining butter until cooked.
4. Remove from heat and gradually stir in flour.
5. Add stock and return to heat.
6. Add sugar and bring to a boil.
7. Simmer gently for about 2 minutes to cook the flour.
8. If the sauce is too thick, add more water.
9. Add whiskey and season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Place the ham steaks on a warmed serving platter and pour the sauce over them.
